title: Add abstraction expansion lock control
description: Control bars now expose a lock button for component/area expansion. While locked, collapsed abstraction nodes, zones, and subgraphs cannot be opened or closed by click.
decision_notes: Added RenderOptions.abstractionLocked plus RenderResult setAbstractionLocked/isAbstractionLocked for programmatic and control-bar use.
The abstraction click handler now checks lock state before expanding/collapsing nodes, zones, or subgraphs.
Locked SVGs receive archmap-abstraction-locked so hover affordance/pointer styling is suppressed while expansion is locked.
Added lock buttons to <archmap-viewer>, index.html, and examples/demo.html; demo/playground preserve lock state across redraws.
